name: Like Popeye's Red Beans and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the beans with their liquid into a large saucepan and place over medium heat.
2. Add white pepper, paprika, butter, and garlic powder to the beans.
3. When the beans come to a boil, use a fork to mash some of them against the side of the pan.
4. Stir the mixture constantly until the beans reach the consistency of refried beans (smooth and creamy with some whole beans intact), about 20 minutes.
To serve:
1. Pour half a cup of beans into a bowl and top with half a cup of rice. Prepare rice according to package directions, using 2 tablespoons butter and 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder instead of the amounts specified on the package.
